The '''Danga family''' were a family of [[Human/Legends|Human]] farmer colonists that lived on [[Sulon/Legends|Sulon]]. They owned the farm south of [[Morgan Katarn]].

In [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], their farm was attacked by a unit of [[Ghost Battalion]] in an attempt to frame Katarn's assassination on the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

The family consisted of at least four people: the father/husband [[Don Danga|Don]], his wife, and two children. All were killed in the raid.
